sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 11:1
items.html: The general departure of the first expansion is called “the first Hey of the name HaVaYaH,” and the general departure of the second expansion is called “the last Hey of HaVaYaH.” (Item 25, and Inner Light there)
